releaseNotes: v0.28.2 — Maintenance release; no customer-facing feature changes. (1) Two big-version dependency refreshes that close long-standing pinning rationales — the CSV engine moves from csv 6 to csv 8 (the underlying library was rewritten upstream; Liberty / Rx30 / ComputerRx / Pharmaserv CSV imports + every backup-CSV export still behave identically and the Bumpus Liberty sample CSV round-trips correctly), and the optional Google Drive backup integration moves from google_sign_in 6 to google_sign_in 7 (Drive sign-in / sign-out / silent re-auth / file upload all preserved). Both unblock future security patches on the underlying libraries. (2) Test coverage closed on the per-scan zone picker that shipped in v0.28.1. 549 tests passing.
